---
name: Feature request
about: A new control, component recipe, export target, or framework adapter
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature.

**The problem it solves**
What can't you do today? What would it unblock?

**Kind of feature**
- [ ] A new visual control / signature style / colour theme
- [ ] A new component recipe
- [ ] A new export target (Style Dictionary, CSS-in-JS, Figma variables, …)
- [ ] A framework adapter (Vue, Svelte, …)
- [ ] Something else

**Sketch / reference**
Links, screenshots, or examples from other tools that show the idea.
